title: Transaction Logs for Digital Product Sales: What It Actually Is and How It Works — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: You're a digital creator in Kenya, and you're tired of being locked out of the global market because you can't use PayPal or Stripe for your ebook sales. You've tried every trick in the book, but you still can't get paid by your international customers. You're not alone. Thousands of creators just like you are struggling to get paid for their hard work. But what if you could sell your digital products to anyone, anywhere in the world, without having to rely on those restrictive payment platforms? That's where transaction logs come in – a game-changing feature that lets you keep track of every sale, without any hassle or delay. With Unchained Commerce, you can unlock the full potential of your digital business and start selling your ebooks to a global audience. But what does this actually mean, and how does it work?
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

A transaction log is a record of every sale made on your Unchained Commerce site. It shows you exactly who bought what, when they made the purchase, and how much they paid. This information is crucial for keeping track of your sales, as well as for tax purposes. Without a transaction log, you'd have to manually record every sale, which can be time-consuming and error-prone. With Unchained Commerce, you get a comprehensive transaction log that's updated in real-time, so you can focus on creating more content and growing your business. This feature is especially important for digital creators who sell high-ticket items, like courses or software, as it helps you keep track of your revenue and stay on top of your finances.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

Unchained Commerce uses a combination of blockchain technology and smart contracts to power its transaction logs. When a customer makes a purchase, the transaction is recorded on the blockchain, which creates a permanent and tamper-proof record of the sale. This information is then stored in your Admin Dashboard, which gives you a clear and concise view of all your sales activity. The Admin Dashboard is a powerful tool that lets you manage your transactions, update your products, and monitor your analytics – all in one place. With Unchained Commerce, you can trust that your transaction logs are secure, reliable, and easy to access.
Who This Is Built For and Why

Transaction logs are a must-have feature for any digital creator who wants to sell their products globally. Whether you're selling ebooks, courses, or software, you need to be able to track your sales and revenue in real-time. With Unchained Commerce, you can sell to anyone, anywhere in the world, without having to worry about payment processing or transaction fees. This makes it an ideal solution for creators who want to expand their reach and grow their business. And with our Admin Dashboard, you get a comprehensive view of all your sales activity, so you can make data-driven decisions and optimize your marketing strategy.
Automated delivery means the download link arrives before the buyer navigates away from the payment confirmation page.

Unchained Commerce's transaction logs are powered by a combination of blockchain technology, smart contracts, and our Admin Dashboard. When a customer makes a purchase, the transaction is recorded on the blockchain, which creates a permanent and tamper-proof record of the sale. This information is then stored in your Admin Dashboard, which gives you a clear and concise view of all your sales activity. Our Admin Dashboard is a powerful tool that lets you manage your transactions, update your products, and monitor your analytics – all in one place. With Unchained Commerce, you can trust that your transaction logs are secure, reliable, and easy to access.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

Now that you know how transaction logs work and why they're so important, it's time to take action. Sign up for Unchained Commerce today and start selling your digital products to a global audience. Our Admin Dashboard is easy to use, even if you're not tech-savvy. And with our comprehensive transaction logs, you can keep track of every sale and stay on top of your finances. Don't wait any longer to grow your business – sign up for Unchained Commerce now and start selling with confidence.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

The fastest path to your first crypto-native digital product sale is a three-step process. First, set up NOWPayments — create an account, configure your wallet address, get your API key. Second, deploy the Core Shop Engine with your product file and NOWPayments credentials. Third, configure Web3 Wallet Connect with your checkout settings and product details. At that point, your store accepts crypto payments and delivers the product automatically. The complete setup, following the included deployment guide, takes most creators two to four hours from start to first test transaction. The Full Stack Bundle at $79.99 includes all three components plus the deployment guide and support access. For a creator who cannot use PayPal or Stripe, this is the infrastructure that makes selling digital products viable.
Every digital file type — ebooks, fonts, presets, plugins, templates — works with the same delivery pipeline.

No platform middleman means no percentage cut, no payout delay, and no content policy that can delist your products.
